string.text:
Pouch with two small magazine pockets, attachable to the belt. Quite durable and high quality. Can be dismantled.
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] Military item
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] Can be worn on the belt

Pouch with three small magazine pockets, attachable to the belt. Quite durable and high quality. Can be dismantled.
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] Military item
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] Can be worn on the belt

Pouch with eight small magazine pockets, attachable to the belt. Quite durable and high quality. Can be dismantled.
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] Military item
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] Can be worn on the belt

Pouch with one medium magazine pocket, attachable to the belt. Quite durable and high quality. Can be dismantled.
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] Military item
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] Can be worn on the belt
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] Dual slot item

Pouch with two medium magazine pockets, attachable to the belt. Quite durable and high quality. Can be dismantled.
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] Military item
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] Can be worn on the belt

Pouch with three medium magazine pockets, attachable to the belt. Quite durable and high quality. Can be dismantled.
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] Military item
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] Can be worn on the belt

Pouch with six medium magazine pockets, attachable to the belt. Quite durable and high quality. Can be dismantled.
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] Military item
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] Can be worn on the belt
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] Dual slot item

A pouch designed to hold drum magazines, you can force ammo boxes to fit as well, if you insist enough. Quite durable and high quality. Can be dismantled.
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] Military item
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] Can be worn on the belt

A pouch designed to hold two drum magazines and a few spare mags alongside it. Who needs quite amount of firepower? Who knows. You can force ammo boxes to fit as well, if you insist enough. Quite durable and high quality. Can be dismantled.
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] military item
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] can be worn on the belt
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] Dual slot item

A Zone-made fanny pack that helps distribute weight, even if it is a small pack in the belt. Can also hold a small magazine if needed. A lot of stalkers use it at a daily basis, making it easy to find.
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] Everyday item
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] Can be worn on the belt

Adidas Fanny pack, similar to the Zone-made ones, it can hold a small magazine if needed and its still as popular as the local product. Popular with bandits, mercs, and some loners.
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] Everyday item
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] Can be worn on the belt

A generic Chinese made sidebag, made of some cheap but durable materials, found plenty in the Zone and used for some cheap weight management, but this comes to a cost of being slower, more visible and more gear to get irradiated.
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] Everyday item
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] Can be worn on the belt
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] Dual slot item

Sometimes these supreme fanny (funny, ho ho) packs make their way into the Zone, maybe as a luxury item, maybe some (fashion challenged) people come to the Zone with it as if it was a drip contest. Either way, it can hold a mag and help distributing weight but... are you sure that you want a bright red thing strapped to your body? maybe giving the enemy a free laser sight is the new drip. stop thinking about it, and be careful with that boar behind you...
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] Everyday item? Luxury item? Drip item?
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] Can be worn on the belt
